title: Randomized Spawn Point
description: After your death, you respawn randomly.
body:
# Randomized Spawn Point

_**Randomized Spawn Point**_ is a simple mod/datapack that adds an extra death penalty by randomizing player spawn locations.
It acts like a difficulty level between Normal and Hardcore.

- On death, players respawn at a random location within a 15,000 × 15,000 area centered at (0, 0)
- On world start, players spawn at a random location within a 7,000 × 7,000 area centered at (0, 0)

This makes survival more challenging without being as punishing as Hardcore mode.

_This mod is meant to be played alongside Reduced World Infos (optional)_ : https://modrinth.com/mod/reduced-world-infos
